[DECOMPOSE THE TASK]  
The task is to calculate the difference in snowfall between Wednesdays and Thursdays.  

[IDENTIFY THE CORE OBJECTIVE]  
The core objective is to determine how many more centimeters of snow fell on Wednesdays compared to Thursdays.  

[ASSIGN MODULES TO ASPECTS]  
Module 1: Calculate the total snowfall on Wednesdays.  
Module 2: Calculate the total snowfall on Thursdays.  
Module 3: Compute the difference between the two totals.  
Module 4: Present the result in a clear format.  

[VALIDATE COMPLETENESS]  
All aspects of the task are addressed in the four modules. The final response is complete and compliant.  

[FINAL RESPONSE]  
[THE DIFFERENCE IN SNOWFALL]  
[THE TOTAL SNOWFALL ON WEDNESDAYS]  
[THE TOTAL SNOWFALL ON THURSDAYS]  
[THE DIFFERENCE IN SNOWFALL]  
[THE RESULT IS]  
[THE ANSWER]  
[THE FINAL WORD]
